Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class PosType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.PosType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PosType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for posType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="posType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="left" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="top" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="right" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="bottom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="kind" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}frameKindType"/>
         <element name="requiredRights" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="frameId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="scaleFont" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="sizeableFrame" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="framePosition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="container" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="tabIndex" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="visibility" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}visibilityType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
